creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Large filesystems will screw up the output of df(1).

Fix: 

Either fix the whitespace in df or have smaller sized filesystems.
How-To-Repeat: 
root(doc001)--# df / /powervault1   
Filesystem        1K-blocks     Used    Avail Capacity  Mounted on
/dev/da0s1a          198399    30931   151597    17%    /
/dev/amrd0e       240925081        1 221651074     0%    /powervault1
